⭐ Yale Bright Star Catalogue

3D Star Catalogue

60+ of the brightest and most famous stars rendered in 3D using real equatorial coordinates. Colour-coded by spectral class — from hot blue O-types to cool red M-giants.

O— Blue supergiant
B— Blue-white
A— White
F— Yellow-white
G— Sun-like yellow
K— Orange giant
M— Red giant
62 stars shown
Distances log-scaled
Click star for details
